ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event took place */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "site" TEXT /* Site where the event was held */,
  "ownerships_from" TEXT /* Details about sponsorship and ownership */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "total_prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money available for the event */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players participating in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., major, regular tournament) */,
  "par_score" INTEGER /* Par score for the course */,
  "course_length" INTEGER /* Length of the course in yards */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "dg_id" INTEGER /* DraftKings ID for player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's salary for the event */,
  "ownership" REAL /* Ownership percentage of the player in the event */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Player's handicap */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the player's primary sponsor */,
  "career_earnings" REAL /* Total career earnings of the player */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of career wins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is tracked */,
  "fin_text" TEXT /* Finishing text (e.g., T2, 1) */,
  "streak_pts" INTEGER /* Points for streak achievements */,
  "bogey_free_pts" INTEGER /* Points for bogey-free rounds */,
  "hole_in_one_pts" INTEGER /* Points for hole-in-one achievements */,
  "sub_70_pts" INTEGER /* Points for rounds under 70 */,
  "hole_score_pts" REAL /* Points accumulated from hole scores */,
  "finish_pts" INTEGER /* Finish points based on position */,
  "total_pts" REAL /* Total points accumulated by the player */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played by the player in the event */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the player in the event */,
  "average_score_per_round" REAL /* Average score per round */,
  "best_round_score" INTEGER /* Best round score */,
  "worst_round_score" INTEGER /* Worst round score */,
  "putts_per_round" REAL /* Average putts per round */,
  "fairways_hit" REAL /* Percentage of fairways hit */,
  "greens_in_regulation" REAL /* Percentage of greens in regulation */,
  "sand_saves" INTEGER /* Number of sand saves */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties incurred */,
  "driving_distance" REAL /* Average driving distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the sponsor is associated with */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., title sponsor, hole sponsor) */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_status" TEXT /* Status of the sponsorship (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., event manager, analyst, sponsor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Site where the event was held
Total prize money available for the event
Number of players participating in the event
Type of event (e.g., major, regular tournament)
Length of the course in yards

Role of the user (e.g., event manager, analyst, sponsor)
